span.p: Need framework-agnostic scoping or a JS-typed style API?

span.p: CSS Modules or plain modern CSS with cascade layers + nesting — scoped class names, zero runtime

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Zero-runtime CSS-in-JS — extracts to static CSS at build, no per-render cost

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Runtime CSS-in-JS — last resort; accept the JS cost + the RSC boundary; isolate to the few dynamic components
